entry.title: Mod Settings (RitsuLib)
entry.subtitle: Edit player-facing mod options here.
baselib.mirroredPage.title: Mod config
baselib.mirroredPage.description: This page is an auto-generated proxy settings page for mods built on BaseLib.
ritsulib.page.title: Settings
ritsulib.page.description: Shared framework options and API reference examples.
ritsulib.section.general.title: General
ritsulib.section.general.description: Player-facing framework options that are actually persisted.
ritsulib.debugCompatibility.label: Debug compatibility mode
ritsulib.debugCompatibility.description: Missing LocString keys fall back to placeholders and warnings instead of throwing immediately.
ritsulib.section.reference.title: Reference
ritsulib.section.reference.description: Preview all currently available settings controls.
ritsulib.reference.intro: Open the debug gallery below to inspect available controls and layout behavior.
ritsulib.reference.gallery.label: Component gallery
ritsulib.reference.gallery.description: This page is for preview and reference only. None of its values are persisted.
ritsulib.showcase.title: Debug Showcase
ritsulib.showcase.description: Preview every control type and observe live description updates without saving any values.
ritsulib.showcase.overview.title: Overview
ritsulib.showcase.header.description: These examples are intentionally transient and exist only as implementation references.
ritsulib.showcase.summary: Toggle: {0} | Double: {1:0.##} | Int: {2} | Choice: {3} | Dropdown: {4} | Mode: {5} | Action Count: {6}
ritsulib.showcase.image.label: Preview image
ritsulib.showcase.image.description: Image preview updates can be paired with dynamic descriptive text. Current mode: {0}
ritsulib.showcase.inputs.title: Inputs
ritsulib.showcase.inputs.description: All values update the descriptive text immediately, but are never written to disk.
ritsulib.showcase.toggle.label: Preview toggle
ritsulib.showcase.slider.label: Preview slider
ritsulib.showcase.intSlider.label: Preview integer slider
ritsulib.showcase.choice.label: Preview choice
ritsulib.showcase.choiceDropdown.label: Preview choice (dropdown)
ritsulib.showcase.choiceDropdown.descrip: Same options as the stepper; opens a custom dropdown list. Current: {0}
ritsulib.showcase.mode.label: Preview enum choice
ritsulib.showcase.string.label: Preview string field
ritsulib.showcase.stringMulti.label: Preview multiline string
ritsulib.showcase.stringMulti.placeholde: Multiple lines — Enter inserts a new line.
ritsulib.showcase.actions.title: Actions
ritsulib.showcase.actions.description: Buttons can mutate preview state and update the surrounding text immediately.
ritsulib.showcase.action.label: Preview action button
ritsulib.showcase.reset.label: Reset preview state
ritsulib.showcase.reset.description: Restore all preview values to their defaults without persisting anything.
ritsulib.showcase.list.title: List Editor
ritsulib.showcase.list.description: A structured list can be displayed, reordered, added, and deleted inside the settings UI.
ritsulib.showcase.list.label: Preview structured list
ritsulib.showcase.footer: Use this page as a quick implementation reference when building settings for other mods.
sidebar.title: Mods
sidebar.subtitle: Browse mods, pages, and sections.
choice.dropdown.tooltip: Opens a list to choose a value. Current: {0}
choice.dropdown.currentRow: This option is the active setting (shown on the closed control).
list.empty: No items yet. Add one to start editing.
empty.none: No mod settings pages are currently registered.
empty.mod: This mod does not currently expose a settings page.
empty.page: The selected settings page could not be found.
color.title: Color Editor
keybinding.hint.combo: Click to record. Supports key combinations.
keybinding.hint.comboNonModifier: Click to record. Supports key combinations and requires a non-modifier key.
keybinding.hint.single: Click to record a single key.
keybinding.hint.capturing: Press a key combination. Esc cancels, Backspace/Delete clears.
ritsulib.showcase.list.field.name: Name
ritsulib.showcase.details.title: Detail Notes
ritsulib.showcase.details.description: Nested list editor example inside each item.
ritsulib.showcase.details.field.label: Label
clipboard.pasteFailedBlocked: Paste was blocked by a custom rule.
clipboard.pasteFailedIncompatible: Clipboard contents are not compatible with this setting.
